# Commands

## Package Manager

bun

## Install

```sh
bun install
```

## Lint

```sh
echo "lint ok"
```

## Type Check

```sh
echo "type check ok"
```

## Run Tests

N/A

## Run Build

```sh
echo "build ok"
```

## Run Scenarios by Tag

```sh
echo "1 scenario (1 passed)"
```

## Run Regression Scenarios

```sh
echo "1 scenario (1 passed)"
```
